title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN FABIAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN ECHAGUE, ISABELA, TO ECHAGUE EAST CENTRAL SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 24516 / 88 OG No. 25, 3892 (June 22, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7494, May 13, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SAN FABIAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN ECHAGUE, ISABELA, TO ECHAGUE EAST CENTRAL SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the San Fabian Elementary School in Echague, Isabela, is hereby changed to Echague East Central School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and December 11, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 13, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
